home.heroTitle: See Sri Lanka the way I'd show my own family.
home.heroSubtitle: Private, driver-guided tours across the island — wildlife, ancient cities, tea country and the coast, planned around you instead of a fixed bus schedule.
home.introTitle: One driver, one guide, one trip built around you.
home.introBody: No shared coaches, no fixed departure times. You tell me what you want to see and how fast you want to move, and I build the route around that. Most of my guests find me through a recommendation from a past guest — that's still how this business runs.
home.routeTitle: From the airport to wherever you want to end up

routeStops.label: Airport pickup
routeStops.note: We talk through your trip on the drive in

routeStops.label: Wild places
routeStops.note: Elephants, birds, and early starts for good light

routeStops.label: Old stone cities
routeStops.note: Ruins and carvings a thousand years old

routeStops.label: The hills
routeStops.note: Tea country, temples above the clouds

routeStops.label: The coast
routeStops.note: Slow days, or none at all

home.toursTitle: Five ways to see the island
home.toursSubtitle: Each one can be shortened, extended, or combined — these are starting points, not fixed packages.
home.galleryTitle: A few frames from recent trips
home.testimonialsTitle: What people say after the trip

testimonials.quote: Krish planned around our kids' nap schedule without us even asking twice. It felt like traveling with family, not a tour company.
testimonials.name: Visiting family

testimonials.quote: We changed the plan twice mid-trip and it was never a problem. That flexibility is worth more than any five-star itinerary.
testimonials.name: Two travelers

testimonials.quote: Best light for the elephants, quietest hour at the temple — small details like that made the whole week better.
testimonials.name: Solo traveler

home.ctaTitle: Tell me what you have in mind.
home.ctaBody: Send a few lines about your dates and interests, and I'll reply with a route built around them.

tours.pageTitle: Five starting points for your trip
tours.pageSubtitle: Every route below can be adjusted in length, pace, and stops. Tell me what matters to you and we'll shape it from there.

tourDetail.priceNote: Final price depends on group size, season, and vehicle. I'll send an exact quote once I know your dates.

gallery.pageTitle: The island, as I see it
gallery.pageSubtitle: A mix of wildlife, old stone, tea country and coast — from trips over the years.

about.introBody1: Krish Lanka Tours & Travels is one driver-guide, not a call centre. When you book a trip, you're booking me — I plan the route, I drive, and I'm the one who shows up at your hotel at 5:30am when the light over the park is worth losing sleep for.
about.introBody2: I grew up around these roads and I still learn something new on most trips. Sri Lanka rewards slowness more than it rewards a packed checklist, and that's the trip I try to build for every guest.
about.valuesTitle: How I try to run things

values.title: Small groups only
values.body: One vehicle, one group. Your trip is never merged with strangers to fill seats.

values.title: Local, not scripted
values.body: I take you to the places I'd take my own visiting family, not just the stops every bus makes.

values.title: Honest about pace
values.body: If a route is too rushed for what you want, I'll say so before you book it, not after.

values.title: Responsible travel
values.body: The small guesthouses, family spice gardens, and local paddlers I work with are part of how the money stays in the community.

about.experienceBody: I've driven and guided across the island long enough to have a shortlist of quiet mountain temples the tour buses miss, and to know which park roads are empty at sunrise. That's the experience I bring to every itinerary.

contact.pageSubtitle: Fill in what you know so far — dates, rough interests, how many people. I reply personally, usually within a day.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Interests, pace, special occasions, accessibility needs...
contact.successBody: Your enquiry is in. I reply personally, usually within a day — check your email (and spam folder, just in case).
contact.errorBody: Something went wrong sending that. Please try again, or reach out directly on WhatsApp below.
contact.whatsappBody: Message me directly for a faster reply.
